pi_items.source: setup_task.sh Python script sets accuracy 1 and rt_ms 45.0 for all 192 trials belonging to sub-99.
setup_task.sh Python script dynamically generates data for participants sub-01 to sub-15.
setup_task.sh and verifier.py logic explicitly calculates individual within-subject regression slopes for each participant before aggregating the group mean, consistent with Lorch & Myers (1990).
verifier.py checks for the file at this exact location.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated dataset of 15 valid participants and one explicitly contaminated participant (sub-99). It has been verified through the setup_task.sh script that sub-99 has invariant reaction times of exactly 45.0ms and 100% accuracy across all trials. The analytical method is Lorch & Myers (1990) within-subject regression, and the expected output file path is /home/ga/pebl/analysis/snarc_report.json, as verified by the setup and evaluation scripts.
